steps.title: Distribute and combine like terms
steps.content: Flip every sign in the second polynomial, then group like terms:$$=6t^4-6t^2+4t-2-5t^4+3t^3-7t^2+2$$Combining yields:$$t^4+3t^3-13t^2+4t$$

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content: The simplified expression is $t^4+3t^3-13t^2+4t$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
